title: Ashen + More Armor Trims Compatibility
description: Ashen Resourcepack addon — adds compatibility with the More Armor Trims mod.
body:
This addon provides modified item textures to ensure compatibility with the More Armor Trims mod while preserving the Ashen resourcepack style.

---

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (sof_izh) on the [Ashen Discord server](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh). Do not report these issues to Aim_Boot, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

---

Credits:
- Aim_Boot – [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack
- masik16u – [More Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-trims) mod
